name: Fellowship Home Loans
description_short: Fellowship Home Loans is a mortgage lender offering FHA, VA, USDA, and conventional loans with a Miami, FL branch serving homebuyers and refinance clients.
description_long:
Fellowship Home Loans operates as a residential mortgage lender with a physical branch location in Miami, Florida (NMLS #819382). The company positions itself as a faith-driven mortgage provider, emphasizing Christian values and ethics in lending practices based on their published content about "Christian mortgage lenders." They serve the Miami market and surrounding areas with a focus on personalized service and knowledgeable loan officers who guide clients through the mortgage process. The company maintains an active online presence with educational content about homeownership and mortgage topics.

The lender offers a comprehensive range of mortgage products including FHA loans, VA loans, USDA loans, and conventional mortgages. They serve multiple borrower profiles: first-time homebuyers, borrowers looking to move up to a new property, investment property purchasers, and homeowners seeking refinancing options. Their website highlights loan programs for purchase mortgages, refinances, new construction financing, and home equity products. They provide mortgage calculators, educational resources about the mortgage process, and guidance on homeownership essentials.

Fellowship Home Loans differentiates itself through its stated faith-driven approach to lending and emphasis on transparent, honest communication. The company reports over 17,500 verified customer reviews with a 4.89/5 average rating, suggesting significant customer volume and consistent satisfaction. Their content strategy includes educational articles on specialized topics like clergy income documentation, demonstrating niche expertise. The brand positions itself as a Christian-focused alternative in the mortgage lending market.

The company operates through a traditional branch model with phone-based origination (800-804-7283) and maintains social media presence across LinkedIn, Facebook, Instagram, and YouTube. However, the website does not display specific loan officers, rates, or detailed product terms, requiring prospective borrowers to contact the branch directly. No information about minimum credit scores, down payment requirements, or competitive rate structures is available on the public-facing site.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Over 17,500 verified customer reviews with 4.89/5 average rating indicating substantial customer base and consistency
Offers diverse loan programs including FHA, VA, USDA, and conventional mortgages to serve different borrower types
Specializes in niche borrower categories such as clergy with documented expertise in pastor housing allowance income documentation
Provides comprehensive educational resources including mortgage calculator, process guides, and homeownership articles
Faith-driven lending model with explicit focus on Christian ethics and transparent communication differentiation
Serves multiple loan purposes: purchase, refinance, new construction, first-time buyer programs, and investment properties
Multiple contact channels available: phone (800-804-7283), contact form, social media, and physical Miami branch location
cons: No loan officers listed on Miami branch page despite claiming to have dedicated staff available
Website does not display current mortgage rates, terms, or pricing information requiring direct contact for quotes
Limited transparency on minimum credit score requirements, down payment minimums, or loan program specifics
Only one physical branch location (Miami, FL) limits in-person accessibility for customers outside South Florida
No information about processing times, approval rates, or competitive rate comparisons available online
best_for: First-time homebuyers seeking personalized guidance through the mortgage process with educational support
Self-employed professionals and clergy seeking specialized income documentation expertise
VA and USDA loan eligible borrowers in South Florida seeking programs tailored to military and rural properties
Faith-motivated borrowers prioritizing ethical lending practices and Christian values alignment in mortgage origination
diagnosis: Fellowship Home Loans is best suited for South Florida homebuyers and refinance customers seeking personalized service with faith-based values, particularly those with non-traditional income (clergy, self-employed) or requiring FHA/VA/USDA programs. The main caveat is that all pricing and terms must be obtained through direct contact, as the website provides no rate quotes or specific loan requirements, making it difficult to compare competitiveness before applying.
services: FHA mortgage loans for standard and non-standard credit profiles
VA mortgage loans for military service members and veterans
USDA mortgage loans for rural and agricultural property purchases
Conventional mortgage loans for qualified borrowers
Home purchase mortgage origination and processing
Home equity loans and lines of credit
Educational resources on mortgage process and homeownership
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
